title: Intensely Creamy German Prawns Papillote
description: A tangy and creamy one-pot German dish featuring prawns, cooked to perfection in a ti-leaf wrap, suitable for ovo-vegetarian diets. This recipe combines the richness of cream with the freshness of prawns and herbs.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and saute the chopped onions until they are translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the prawns to the skillet and cook until they are pink and just done, about 2-3 minutes per side.
In a small bowl, whisk together the heavy cream, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Stir the cream mixture into the skillet with the prawns and onions, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 2 minutes, until it has thickened slightly.
Lay a ti leaf flat on a work surface and place a quarter of the prawn mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the ti leaf over the filling to form a packet, and repeat with the remaining ingredients.
Place the packets in a baking dish and bake for 10 minutes, until the ti leaves are tender and the filling is hot and creamy.
